testcase.name: test_empty_input_just_eof

failure.message: TypeError: object of type 'NoneType' has no len()

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:14: in test_empty_input_just_eof assert len(toks) == 1 ^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: object of type 'NoneType' has no len()

testcase.name: test_let_x_eq_1_plus_2

failure.message: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:20: in test_let_x_eq_1_plus_2 assert kinds(toks) == [ ^^^^^^^^^^^ ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:5: in kinds return [t.kind for t in toks] ^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.name: test_keywords_vs_identifiers

failure.message: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:28: in test_keywords_vs_identifiers assert kinds(toks)[:4] == ["KEYWORD", "IDENT", "KEYWORD", "IDENT"] ^^^^^^^^^^^ ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:5: in kinds return [t.kind for t in toks] ^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.name: test_multi_char_punct

failure.message: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:37: in test_multi_char_punct assert [t.value for t in toks if t.kind == "PUNCT"] == ["==", "!=", "<=", ">=", "&&", "||"] ^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.name: test_single_char_punct_after_multi

failure.message: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:46: in test_single_char_punct_after_multi assert any(t.kind == "PUNCT" and t.value == "=" for t in toks) ^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.name: test_string_escapes

failure.message: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:51: in test_string_escapes s = [t for t in toks if t.kind == "STRING"][0] ^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.name: test_comments_stripped

failure.message: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:58: in test_comments_stripped idents = [t.value for t in toks if t.kind == "IDENT"] ^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.name: test_line_col_tracking

failure.message: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:64: in test_line_col_tracking let_tok = toks[0] ^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_unknown_char_errors

failure.message: Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'Exception'>

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:72: in test_unknown_char_errors with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'Exception'>

testcase.name: test_number_and_float

failure.message: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:83: in test_number_and_float nums = [t.value for t in toks if t.kind == "NUMBER"] ^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.name: test_eof_only_once

failure.message: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:90: in test_eof_only_once assert sum(1 for t in toks if t.kind == "EOF") == 1 ^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

testcase.name: test_let_stmt

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [] == ['LetStmt']
Right contains one more item: 'LetStmt' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure: tests/test_parser.py:10: in test_let_stmt assert names_of(p.stmts) == ["LetStmt"] E AssertionError: assert [] == ['LetStmt'] E E Right contains one more item: 'LetStmt' E Use -v to get more diff
